name: select
description: Displays a list of options for the user to pick from

files.content:
<script lang="ts">
  import { Select } from 'bits-ui'
  import type { Snippet } from 'svelte'

  interface Props extends Select.RootProps {
    children?: Snippet
  }

  let { children, ...restProps }: Props = $props()
</script>

<Select.Root {...restProps}>
  {@render children?.()}
</Select.Root>

<script lang="ts">
  import { Select } from 'bits-ui'
  import { ChevronDown } from 'lucide-svelte'
  import type { Snippet } from 'svelte'
  import { cn } from '$lib/utils.js'

  interface Props extends Select.TriggerProps {
    class?: string
    children?: Snippet
  }

  let { class: className, children, ...restProps }: Props = $props()
</script>

<Select.Trigger
  class={cn(
    'flex h-11 w-full items-center justify-between border-3 border-input bg-background px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium shadow-[4px_4px_0px_hsl(var(--shadow-color))] placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus:outline-none focus:translate-x-[4px] focus:translate-y-[4px] focus:shadow-none disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50 [&>span]:line-clamp-1 transition-all duration-200',
    className
  )}
  {...restProps}
>
  {@render children?.()}
  <ChevronDown class="h-5 w-5 stroke-[3]" />
</Select.Trigger>

<script lang="ts">
  import { Select } from 'bits-ui'

  interface Props extends Select.ValueProps {
    placeholder?: string
  }

  let { placeholder, ...restProps }: Props = $props()
</script>

<Select.Value {placeholder} {...restProps} />

<script lang="ts">
  import { Select } from 'bits-ui'
  import { ChevronUp, ChevronDown } from 'lucide-svelte'
  import type { Snippet } from 'svelte'
  import { cn } from '$lib/utils.js'

  interface Props extends Select.ContentProps {
    class?: string
    position?: 'item-aligned' | 'popper'
    children?: Snippet
  }

  let { class: className, position = 'popper', children, ...restProps }: Props = $props()
</script>

<Select.Portal>
  <Select.Content
    {position}
    class={cn(
      'relative z-50 max-h-96 min-w-[8rem] overflow-hidden border-3 border-foreground bg-popover text-popover-foreground shadow-[4px_4px_0px_hsl(var(--shadow-color))]',
      position === 'popper' &&
        'data-[side=bottom]:translate-y-1 data-[side=left]:-translate-x-1 data-[side=right]:translate-x-1 data-[side=top]:-translate-y-1',
      className
    )}
    {...restProps}
  >
    <Select.ScrollUpButton class="flex cursor-default items-center justify-center py-1">
      <ChevronUp class="h-4 w-4 stroke-[3]" />
    </Select.ScrollUpButton>
    <Select.Viewport
      class={cn(
        'p-1',
        position === 'popper' &&
          'h-[var(--bits-select-anchor-height)] w-full min-w-[var(--bits-select-anchor-width)]'
      )}
    >
      {@render children?.()}
    </Select.Viewport>
    <Select.ScrollDownButton class="flex cursor-default items-center justify-center py-1">
      <ChevronDown class="h-4 w-4 stroke-[3]" />
    </Select.ScrollDownButton>
  </Select.Content>
</Select.Portal>
{#snippet children({ isSelected })} {#if isSelected} {/if} {label} {/snippet}

<script lang="ts">
  import { Select } from 'bits-ui'
  import type { Snippet } from 'svelte'

  interface Props extends Select.GroupProps {
    children?: Snippet
  }

  let { children, ...restProps }: Props = $props()
</script>

<Select.Group {...restProps}>
  {@render children?.()}
</Select.Group>

<script lang="ts">
  import { Select } from 'bits-ui'
  import type { Snippet } from 'svelte'
  import { cn } from '$lib/utils.js'

  interface Props extends Select.GroupHeadingProps {
    class?: string
    children?: Snippet
  }

  let { class: className, children, ...restProps }: Props = $props()
</script>

<Select.GroupHeading
  class={cn('py-1.5 pl-8 pr-2 text-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-wide', className)}
  {...restProps}
>
  {@render children?.()}
</Select.GroupHeading>

<script lang="ts">
  import { Select } from 'bits-ui'
  import { cn } from '$lib/utils.js'

  interface Props extends Select.SeparatorProps {
    class?: string
  }

  let { class: className, ...restProps }: Props = $props()
</script>

<Select.Separator class={cn('-mx-1 my-1 h-px bg-foreground', className)} {...restProps} />
